name: S1_L3_红→蓝
donor: 在一间窗明几净的自动化装配车间里,一台白色的六轴工业机械臂正从金属工作台上稳稳夹起一个鲜艳的红色立方体,机械臂关节平滑转动,将立方体水平移动到右侧,轻轻放进一个银灰色的金属料箱中。背景是排列整齐、正在运转的自动化产线设备,顶部灯光明亮均匀,整个画面冷峻而富有工业科技感。
request: 自动化装配车间中,一只白色工业机械臂将工作台上的蓝色立方体抓起,经过平滑的关节运动送往右侧,放进银灰色料箱里。背景排布着正在作业的产线设备,光线明亮均匀,整体呈现冷色工业质感。

name: URBAN_A1_蓝van→红van
donor: The video presents a cinematic, first-person wandering experience through a hyper-realistic urban environment rendered in a video game engine. It begins with a static, sun-drenched alley framed by graffiti-laden industrial walls and overhead power lines. As the camera pans right and tilts upward, it reveals a sprawling cityscape dominated by towering skyscrapers, bathed in warm late-afternoon light that casts long shadows and lens flares. The perspective transitions into a smooth forward tracking shot along a cracked sidewalk, passing weathered fences, palm trees, and distant pedestrians, culminating in a stabilized view of a small blue van parked at an intersection surrounded by parking garages and traffic lights.
request: A cinematic first-person walk through a photorealistic urban environment from a video game engine. Starting in a sunlit alley with graffiti-covered industrial walls and overhead cables, the camera pans up to reveal towering skyscrapers in warm late-afternoon light with long shadows and lens flares, then tracks forward along a cracked sidewalk past weathered fences, palm trees and distant pedestrians, ending on a small red van parked at an intersection among parking garages and traffic lights.

name: URBAN_A2_蓝van→黄taxi
donor: The video presents a cinematic, first-person wandering experience through a hyper-realistic urban environment rendered in a video game engine. It begins with a static, sun-drenched alley framed by graffiti-laden industrial walls and overhead power lines. As the camera pans right and tilts upward, it reveals a sprawling cityscape dominated by towering skyscrapers, bathed in warm late-afternoon light that casts long shadows and lens flares. The perspective transitions into a smooth forward tracking shot along a cracked sidewalk, passing weathered fences, palm trees, and distant pedestrians, culminating in a stabilized view of a small blue van parked at an intersection surrounded by parking garages and traffic lights.
request: First-person exploration of a gritty, hyper-real city built in a game engine. From a sunlit graffiti alley the view rises to skyscrapers under golden late-day light, then glides along a worn sidewalk past fences, palm trees and a few pedestrians, finally settling on a yellow taxi stopped at a busy intersection with traffic lights and garages.
